FIFA World Cup: Koné injured as Canada leads 3-0, Qatar down to 9 men. Follow live updates here.

ADVERTISEMENT

FIFA World Cup: Koné injured as Canada leads 3-0, Qatar down to 9 men. Follow live updates here.

Canada’s second match of the 2026 FIFA World Cup is also Vancouver’s second. B.C. Place is set to transform into a sea of red this afternoon as the co-hosts take on Qatar in Group B action. Kickoff is at 3 p.m. PT.

Toronto mansion hits the market for $10.9 million. Its closet is bigger than some apartments.

The property was put on the market earlier this month and spans a total of 10,135.83 square feet. It comes with five bedrooms and eight bathrooms with enough parking for 10 vehicles.
